description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: In the driver documentation, using the LTS version of the Node.js driver, copy a Node.js example that shows how to connect to the database over SSL.
tasks.name: In the driver documentation, using the LTS version of the Node.js driver, copy a Node.js example that shows how to connect to the database over SSL.
tasks.description: In the driver documentation, using the LTS version of the Node.js driver, copy a Node.js example that shows how to connect to the database over SSL.

tasks.instruction: From the backup strategy comparison, choose a strategy whose storage usage is medium or low, open its details, and go to its step-by-step guide section.
tasks.name: From the backup strategy comparison, choose a strategy whose storage usage is medium or low, open its details, and go to its step-by-step guide section.
tasks.description: From the backup strategy comparison, choose a strategy whose storage usage is medium or low, open its details, and go to its step-by-step guide section.

tasks.instruction: In the SQL examples, find a Standard SQL table schema sample whose CREATE TABLE statement includes at least one JSON-type column and at least one timestamp-type column, and copy the full statement.

target_names: User activity table with json and timestamp columns

tasks.name: In the SQL examples, find a Standard SQL table schema sample whose CREATE TABLE statement includes at least one JSON-type column and at least one timestamp-type column, and copy the full statement.
tasks.description: In the SQL examples, find a Standard SQL table schema sample whose CREATE TABLE statement includes at least one JSON-type column and at least one timestamp-type column, and copy the full statement.

tasks.instruction: In the configuration reference, find a connection-related setting whose documented maximum value allows at least 5000 concurrent clients and copy its command-line usage example.
tasks.name: In the configuration reference, find a connection-related setting whose documented maximum value allows at least 5000 concurrent clients and copy its command-line usage example.
tasks.description: In the configuration reference, find a connection-related setting whose documented maximum value allows at least 5000 concurrent clients and copy its command-line usage example.

tasks.instruction: With the documentation version set to 4.8, locate a Python JOIN query example that uses index hints for optimization and copy that example.

target_names: Optimized JOIN with index hint (Python, v4.8)

tasks.name: With the documentation version set to 4.8, locate a Python JOIN query example that uses index hints for optimization and copy that example.
tasks.description: With the documentation version set to 4.8, locate a Python JOIN query example that uses index hints for optimization and copy that example.

tasks.instruction: In the replication cluster CLI setup documentation, select the topology with one primary and two replicas and copy the Bash script that creates that cluster.
tasks.name: In the replication cluster CLI setup documentation, select the topology with one primary and two replicas and copy the Bash script that creates that cluster.
tasks.description: In the replication cluster CLI setup documentation, select the topology with one primary and two replicas and copy the Bash script that creates that cluster.

tasks.instruction: In the MySQL migration documentation, find a pre-migration checklist presented in markdown that contains at least five numbered items and copy it.
tasks.name: In the MySQL migration documentation, find a pre-migration checklist presented in markdown that contains at least five numbered items and copy it.
tasks.description: In the MySQL migration documentation, find a pre-migration checklist presented in markdown that contains at least five numbered items and copy it.

tasks.instruction: Using the error code reference, look up error DB-1042 for a production environment and copy its resolution steps.

target_names: How to resolve DB-1042 in Production

tasks.name: Using the error code reference, look up error DB-1042 for a production environment and copy its resolution steps.
tasks.description: Using the error code reference, look up error DB-1042 for a production environment and copy its resolution steps.

tasks.instruction: In the service limits documentation, for the Standard plan in region US-East-1, copy the value of the maximum database size from the storage limits table.
